narrative:
DRIVER
USD leads CSM at 100 on both D1 and H4 in a Risk-Off High regime, driven by VIX up 6.8%, S&P 500 down 1.2%, and copper collapsing 4.2% signaling genuine growth fear. USDCHF is the cleanest expression with D1+H4 Strong Buy, 1212 H4 momentum at 78, and EURUSD negative correlation at -0.76 amplifying the CHF-as-funding-unwind story alongside USDCAD which confirms on D1+H4 Buy with CMP at 60. AUD H4 CSM at 26 versus D1 at 65 is a 39-point divergence flagged as critical short-term signal, meaning AUDUSD sells and AUDJPY longs from D1 are traps right now.

MOMENTUM
Gaining: USDCAD CMP 60 with D1 59 rising and H4 70 accelerating, USDJPY H4 79 surging
Fading: EURUSD CMP 37 H4 momentum 13 collapsing, GBPUSD CMP 36 H4 13 decelerating, NZDUSD H4 17 fading hard against rising D1

WATCH
Silver down 8.67 percent triggers AUDUSD extension lower if it breaks weekly support, confirming commodity currency capitulation
US 10Y yield at 4.595 rising 3 percent pressures USDJPY toward next resistance if data reinforces inflation narrative
GBPUSD D1 Sell aligned with H4 Sell and GBP CSM at zero means any USD positive surprise accelerates GBPJPY lower through the 0.94 correlation

themes.theme: Inflation fears driving bond yields higher
Broad-based commodity weakness across agricultural complex
Energy market stress from supply disruption concerns

key_observation: Strong risk-off environment with equities selling sharply on inflation fears and rising yields. USD receiving typical safe-haven bid. Agricultural commodities broadly under pressure suggesting demand concerns. Energy supported by supply disruption fears but equity selloff may limit upside.
watch: Magnitude of equity decline and yield moves, crude oil supply disruption developments, whether USD strength accelerates into weekend, Fed communications on inflation trajectory
